Model Overview

Source: vignettes/model-overview.Rmd
model-overview.Rmd

This vignette documents the two-strain dengue model, its state variables, parameters, and the simulation workflow exposed by twostraindengue.

library(twostraindengue)

parameters <- default_parameters()
state <- default_state(parameters)
time_grid <- seq(0, 2, by = 0.1)

model_output <- run_model(state, time_grid, parameters)
head(extract_reported_cases(model_output))
#>      classical hemorrhagic
#> [1,]  4.000000   1.0000000
#> [2,]  4.574777   0.9295072
#> [3,]  5.154836   0.8702416
#> [4,]  5.747903   0.8217707
#> [5,]  6.360186   0.7837030
#> [6,]  6.996752   0.7556928

The package keeps the model interface deliberately small: defaults are exposed through default_parameters() and default_state(), the ODE solve is wrapped by run_model(), and reported classical and hemorrhagic cases can be extracted with extract_reported_cases().

Developed by Manuel Cota.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
